text.title: pm-tool-selection Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for pm-tool-selection as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running a POC on a decision already made by leadership.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Theater POCs erode trust when the team recognizes the outcome is predetermined; skip the process or run a genuine evaluation.

failure-mode.description: Switching tools mid-project under deadline pressure.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tool migration cost — lost automations, broken integrations, retrained muscle memory — always exceeds the friction being escaped during an active project.

failure-mode.description: LLM confidently asserts vendor features without a citation URL.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs hallucinate vendor features; pricing pages change quarterly without announcement. Gate every feature claim on a live-fetched citation; fail closed if no URL is provided.

failure-mode.description: Agent scores mobile app quality at 8/10 without testing the app on a physical device.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Synthetic mobile UX scores are fiction; outsource physical-device testing to a human evaluator or defer the criterion.

failure-mode.description: ADR-drafting agent consistently favours Linear over alternatives.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Training data bias from developer Twitter skews toward Linear; force the agent to argue the strongest case for the second-place tool before writing the final recommendation.
